**Acceptance Criteria**

FAIL. The latest prior review item is not cleanly resolved in the test suite.

- [crates/jit/tests/init_tests.rs:75](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/init_tests.rs:75): `test_init_outside_git_scaffolds_rules_without_creating_dot_git` uses `TempDir::new()`, which is not guaranteed to create a directory outside a Git worktree. In this environment it creates under `/tmp/claude-1000`, which is itself inside Git, so `jit init` attempts to lock `/tmp/claude-1000/.git/jit/locks/rules.lock` and the test fails. This makes the regression test non-hermetic. With `TMPDIR=/tmp`, the targeted test passes, confirming the test setup is environment-sensitive.
